evals.prompt: I need a signup form with email, password, and a terms checkbox. Email should validate on blur, password needs to be at least 8 chars with onChange validation (debounced), and the form should show server-side errors too. Use @base-ui/react.
evals.expected_output: A React component using Field, Form, Checkbox, Input from @base-ui/react with correct validation modes and server error handling

evals.prompt: Build me a context menu for a file manager app — it should have Cut, Copy, Paste items, a separator, then a 'Sort by' submenu with radio options for Name/Date/Size, and a 'Show hidden files' checkbox item. I'm using base-ui.
evals.expected_output: A React component using Menu with submenu, RadioGroup, CheckboxItem from @base-ui/react with correct Portal > Positioner > Popup pattern

evals.prompt: Set up a toast notification system in my React app. I need success, error, and loading toasts. The loading toast should convert to success/error when an API call resolves. Also add swipe-to-dismiss.
evals.expected_output: A React toast system using Toast.Provider, Toast.useToastManager, and toastManager.promise from @base-ui/react

evals.prompt: I'm building a custom Chip component that needs to support Base UI's render prop pattern. It should have a 'variant' state (filled/outlined) and a 'removable' state. When removable, it shows a close button. I also need to merge props from multiple sources — the component's internal handlers and the consumer's props. Using @base-ui/react utilities.
evals.expected_output: A custom Chip component using useRender, mergeProps, and stateAttributesMapping from @base-ui/react
